description_long: This is a beaded necklace composed of a series of rounded, multicolored beads strung together on a cord. The beads display a variety of pastel and earthy tones, including pinks, purples, browns, and creams, giving the necklace a vibrant yet natural appearance. The beads are relatively large and irregular in shape, suggesting a handcrafted or artisanal style. The cord connecting the beads is yellow and appears flexible, with metallic clasps or connectors at each end. The necklace is displayed on a white, contoured jewelry bust, which accentuates the curvature and drape of the piece. The overall design is eclectic and visually engaging, suitable for casual or bohemian fashion.
description: A colorful beaded necklace with large, irregular multicolored beads strung on a yellow cord, featuring metallic connectors. The design is vibrant and artisanal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full array of multicolored beads and the necklace's symmetrical drape on the bust.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the thickness of the beads and the yellow cord extending behind the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the yellow cord and metallic connectors, with no beads visible from this angle.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the cord and bead thickness from another profile.
